commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: fix(control-ui): preserve numeric chat input in composer
target.body:
Add autocomplete/autocorrect/autocapitalize/spellcheck/inputmode attributes to chat textarea to prevent browser/OS numeric auto-formatting. Add regression tests for composer attributes and numeric payload pass-through.

## Summary

**Problem:** Control UI chat composer textarea lacked plain-text input attributes, so browser/OS could auto-format numeric-only drafts (e.g. `123456789` becoming `123,456,789`) before `chat.send`.

**Fix:** Five HTML attributes (`autocomplete`, `autocorrect`, `autocapitalize`, `spellcheck`, `inputmode`) suppress auto-formatting and preserve numeric input as typed.

**Out of scope:** No gateway/message normalization/send-pipeline changes. Broader Chinese input formatting (refs #80198) not addressed.

## Linked context

Closes #74354

## Real behavior proof

- Environment: Windows 11, Node.js v22.11.0, OpenClaw latest main (2026-06-02)
- Commands: `git diff --stat` (3 files, +45/-1); manual code review of all changes
- Evidence: Attributes placed at composer textarea boundary; send-path test verifies `123456789` forwarded unchanged; composer test asserts HTML attributes on rendered textarea
- Not tested: Live browser/OS formatting recreation (CI will provide broader validation)

## Tests and validation

- `ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`: New `describe("chat composer input behavior")` — asserts 5 attributes
- `ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts`: New `it("forwards numeric-only chatMessage to chat.send unchanged")` — verifies `123456789` pass-through
- No CHANGELOG.md edits

## Risk checklist

- User-visible: No (static HTML attributes only)
- Config/env/migration: No
- Security/auth/network: No
- Highest risk: Minimal — additive HTML only, no logic changes

## Current review state

- Branch refreshed against latest upstream main (Dependency Guard checkable)
- Addressed: Greptile P2 test title, ClawSweeper P1 CHANGELOG removal, RomneyDa rebase request
- [x] AI-assisted (built with Codex)
